description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a formal outfit, featuring a fitted blazer with a contrasting lapel, a collared shirt, and slim trousers. The individual has a distinct facial feature: a cybernetic or mechanical device covering one eye, suggesting a futuristic or technologically enhanced character. The figure's posture is upright, with arms extended horizontally, and the legs are straight and close together. The shoes are formal and match the overall business-like attire. The hairstyle is short and neatly shaped, complementing the clean lines of the outfit. The asset's proportions and details indicate it is intended to represent a pedestrian in an urban or modern context.
description: A stylized adult male in a formal suit with a cybernetic eye device, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has a neat short hairstyle and wears formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the formal blazer, collared shirt, cybernetic eye device, and upright posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the cybernetic device, and the slim fit of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, the short hairstyle, and the straight alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the cybernetic device, and the overall slim silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit with collared shirt and fitted trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
